headline: Kvika banki hf.: Moody’s confirms Kvika’s issuer- and deposit ratings; outlook stable
summary: Moody’s Ratings (“Moody’s”) today confirmed Kvika banki hf.’s („Kvika“) long-term and short-term deposit ratings of Baa1/P-2, the long-term issuer ratings of Baa2, and the Baseline Credit Assessment (BCA) and Adjusted BCA of ba1. The (P)Baa2 senior unsecured Euro Medium Term Notes (EMTN) program ratings, and (P)Ba1 junior senior unsecured EMTN program ratings were also affirmed. Finally, the subordinated EMTN program ratings were upgraded to (P)Ba1 from (P)Ba2. Moody’s outlook on Kvika’s rating

headline: Robinhood Gets In-Principle Approval From MAS for Singapore Launch
summary: HOOD gets in-principle approval to enter Singapore, advancing its Asia-Pacific expansion, but still pending full regulatory clearance.

raw.headline: Robinhood Gets In-Principle Approval From MAS for Singapore Launch
raw.summary: HOOD gets in-principle approval to enter Singapore, advancing its Asia-Pacific expansion, but still pending full regulatory clearance.

headline: CareTrust REIT Receives Investment Grade Rating Upgrade from Moody’s
summary: DANA POINT, Calif., April 27, 2026--CareTrust REIT, Inc. (NYSE:CTRE) ("CareTrust" or the "Company") announced today that Moody’s Ratings ("Moody’s") upgraded the Company’s issuer rating and senior unsecured notes to an investment grade rating of Baa3. The outlook was changed from positive to stable following the ratings upgrade.

raw.headline: CareTrust REIT Receives Investment Grade Rating Upgrade from Moody’s

The outlook was changed from positive to stable following the ratings upgrade.
